qualified_names.why: Score above 30, reversal risk below 40, low disparity, high evidence quality.
Score near threshold, reversal risk below 40, clear subscriber/FCF metric.

excluded_high_reversal_or_weak_names.reason: Score above 30 but reversal risk 55 from capex and elevated AI expectations.
Strong downside score but reversal risk 57 after large pre-earnings selloff.
Strong downside score but reversal risk 61 from delivery beat, short interest and narrative squeeze risk.
Downside score above threshold in absolute terms but reversal risk 52 after severe de-rating.
Absolute score above 30 but reversal risk 42.

research_allocation_view.plain_statement: This is a research prioritization model, not financial advice.

disclaimer_text: This is research, not financial advice. Earnings reactions are highly uncertain and can be driven by market positioning, guidance, macro conditions, and management commentary rather than reported results alone.
